title: Success-Manifest
description: Payment provider manifest response body information.

paymentMethods.description: Describes each payment method supported by payment provider and exposed its respective metadata.

allowsSplit.description: Describes which transaction flow stage the connector should receive payment split data. Check more details on the [Split Payouts on the Payment Provider Protocol](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/split-payouts-on-payment-provider-protocol) article.

customFields.description: Describes the customized fields supported by the connector. Except for `appKey` or `appToken` values, which must be defined in homonymous fields, any other security data should be sent or stored as `password` type fields.

options.description: In case of `select` type, the possible params are `text` and `value`.

autoSettleDelay.description: Describes the allowed delay value for the auto settle capture. Accepted values: `minimum` and `maximum` in whole hours (decimals are not allowed). Check more details on the [Custom Auto Capture Feature](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/custom-auto-capture-feature) article.

minimum.description: Minimum amount of time to auto settle in hours.

maximum.description: Maximum amount of time to auto settle in hours.

metadataFields.description: Array containing the names of the metadata fields sent from the provider to the payment gateway. Limitations: the array must contain a maximum of 3 strings, and each of them, a maximum of 20 characters.
